name: Doxycycline
description: Ọgwụ nje tetracycline sara mbara. Oral ọnya prophylaxis ọzọ maka penicillin-ihe nfụkasị ahụ. Ọ dịkwa irè megide ihe ndị na-adịghị ahụkebe na ụfọdụ ọrịa na-ebute site na vector (ọrịa ịba na mpaghara endemic).
indications: Prophylaxis nke ịba na mpaghara ebe a na-efe efe
dose: 100 mg PO kwa awa 12 x 7 ụbọchị.
window: Malite n'ime awa 3 nke mmerụ ahụ maka prophylaxis ọnya.
contraindications: Ime ime (na-ebute mwepu nha nha nwa ebu n'afọ na igbochi uto ọkpụkpụ)
Ụmụaka na-erubeghị afọ 8 (otu ihe kpatara ya)
warnings: AKWỤKWỌ n'ime ime -- jiri amoxicillin kama.
Mmetụta foto -- dụrụ onye ọrịa ọdụ ka ọ zere ikpughe anyanwụ.
Ejila nri ndị nwere calcium, antacids, ma ọ bụ ígwè - na-emebi mmịnye.

pediatric.dose: Contraindicated n'okpuru afọ 8. Afọ 8+: 2-4 mg / kg / ụbọchị kewara q12h (karịa 100 mg / dose).
pediatric.note: Jiri amoxicillin maka ụmụaka na-erubeghị afọ 8.

obstetric.note: AKWỤKWỌ n'ime ime -- na-ebute mmerụ ahụ nwa ebu n'afọ. Jiri amoxicillin kama.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
